---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature to help me improve
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: "type: feature"
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you want to see implemented.

## Motivation
Why is this feature important? What problem does it solve? How would it improve the user experience?

## Suggested Implementation
How do you envision this feature being implemented?
Are there any specific design patterns or technologies that should be used?
- [ ] `component: store`
- [ ] `component: networking`
- [ ] `component: commands`
- [ ] `component: resp`

## Alternatives
Have you considered any alternative solutions or approaches? 
If so, please describe them and explain why you think your suggested implementation is better.
